app.title: ShopeeStatX
app.subtitle: Your Shopee order statistics
popup.featureDesc: View purchase history, spending trends, and per-shop statistics
popup.warning: Please open Shopee and log in first.
welcome.title: Welcome to ShopeeStatX
welcome.tagline: Track and analyze all your Shopee spending
welcome.featureGetHistoryDesc: Automatically fetch all your Shopee orders — no time limit
welcome.featureAnalyticsDesc: Monthly spending charts, top shops, daily drill-down
welcome.featureExportDesc: Export your entire order history to Excel (.xlsx)
welcome.permission.activeTab: Check that you're on shopee.vn before starting
welcome.permission.storage: Cache order data locally on your machine (never sent anywhere)
welcome.permission.scripting: Call Shopee API using your browser session (needed to fetch data)
welcome.permission.host: Extension only works on shopee.vn — no other websites
welcome.privacyNote: Your data never leaves your machine. No server, no accounts, no personal data collection.
welcome.step1Desc: Open shopee.vn and log in to your account
welcome.step2Desc: Click the ShopeeStatX icon on the Chrome toolbar
welcome.step3Desc: Click Start Analysis — the extension will fetch all order history
welcome.step4Desc: Use filters, charts, drill-down, export to Excel as you like
welcome.ctaNote: Extension only works when you're on shopee.vn and logged in
welcome.footerDisclaimer: ShopeeStatX is not affiliated with official Shopee
nodata.text: No data available. Please try again.
summary.tooltip.orders: Number of orders shown after applying filters
summary.tooltip.totalSpent: Completed orders only, excludes cancelled and returned
heatmap.title: Daily Spending (Last 12 Months)
insights.title: Spending Analysis
insights.empty: Not enough data to analyze yet.
loyalty.title: Favorite Shops
budget.title: Budget Settings
budget.limit.label: Monthly limit (VND)
budget.threshold.label: Alert at:
budget.enabled.label: Enable budget tracking
empty.title: No orders found
empty.message: Try changing filters or search terms
refresh.btn.title: Refresh data
theme.btn.title: Toggle dark/light mode
